tests.name: timeline/Summary renders current commit metadata and message details
timeline/Summary renders a root-commit badge and omits the body for a simple one-line root commit
timeline/Summary collapses the current commit details behind a toggle
timeline/Controls renders icon transport controls, a muted date readout, and boundary disabled states
timeline/Controls delegates click handlers for the navigation controls
timeline/Controls switches to pause state and disables forward navigation at the end
timeline/CommitList renders commits newest-first and highlights the current commit
timeline/CommitList calls onSelectCommit with the selected sha and shows merge commits
timeline/CommitList collapses the commit list behind a section toggle
timeline/Status renders a disabled Index Repo button when graph data is unavailable
timeline/Status renders an Index Repo button when graph data is available
timeline/Status calls onIndexRepo when the Index Repo button is clicked
timeline/Status renders progress details and fill width when indexing with progress
timeline/Status renders zero progress when the total count is zero
timeline/Status renders a generic indexing message when progress is unavailable
timeline/Status keeps the Index Repo button disabled while the graph is still loading
timeline/Track renders the track, markers, and axis labels
timeline/Track sets the track element and applies the expected track, marker, and wrapper styles
timeline/Track delegates track scrubbing interactions
timeline/Track shows tooltip details for the hovered commit marker
timeline/Track closes the tooltip when the hovered marker is left
timeline/Track responds to tooltip open state changes from the trigger
timeline/Track positions axis labels and the now label relative to the commit range
timeline/Track renders the formatted author and date line in the tooltip
graphCornerControls/view renders zoom, fit, and open in editor buttons
graphCornerControls/view posts graph control requests to the window
DepthViewControls renders nothing when depth view is not active
DepthViewControls renders the slider and current value when depth view is active
DepthViewControls posts CHANGE_DEPTH_LIMIT when the slider changes
DepthViewControls renders a compact icon and value pill when only one depth is available
DepthViewControls passes the effective depth as a single-value slider array
GraphIndexStatus renders nothing when indexing is inactive
GraphIndexStatus renders nothing when indexing is inactive even if stale progress exists
GraphIndexStatus renders the phase label and percent while indexing
GraphIndexStatus shows zero progress when the total is zero
graph/viewHandlers focuses a 2d node at the origin when coordinates are missing
graph/viewHandlers focuses a 3d node by filtering zoom-to-fit candidates by id
graph/viewHandlers does nothing when focusing a node that is not in the graph
graph/viewHandlers tolerates a missing 2d graph ref when focusing a node
graph/viewHandlers fits the 2d graph view
graph/viewHandlers tolerates a missing 2d graph ref when fitting the view with measurable bounds
graph/viewHandlers tolerates a missing 2d graph ref when falling back to zoom-to-fit
graph/viewHandlers fits the 3d graph view
graph/viewHandlers pads 2d fit view by the largest rendered node size when available
graph/viewHandlers adds extra bottom clearance when fitting the depth view in 2d
graph/viewHandlers pads 3d fit view by the largest rendered node size when available
graph/viewHandlers tolerates a missing 3d graph ref when fitting the view
graph/viewHandlers scales the current 2d zoom by the requested factor
graph/viewHandlers does nothing when the 2d graph ref is missing during zoom
graph/viewHandlers updates the access count for the matching node only
graph/viewHandlers does nothing when updating the access count for a missing node
SlotHost attaches the host element on mount and detaches it on unmount
SlotHost reattaches the host when the slot changes
graphView/view/broadcast sends depth mode and the current depth limit
graphView/view/broadcast builds the legends-updated payload with webview image urls
graphView/view/broadcast prefers the active view webview for workspace-relative group images
graphView/view/broadcast falls back to the first panel webview for workspace-relative group images
timeline/viewState getCurrentCommitIndex returns zero when there is no current commit sha
timeline/viewState getCurrentCommitIndex returns zero when the current commit sha is not present
timeline/viewState getCurrentCommitIndex returns zero when there are no timeline commits
timeline/viewState getCurrentCommitIndex returns the first commit index when the first sha is present
timeline/viewState getCurrentCommitIndex returns the matching commit index when the sha is present
timeline/viewState buildTimelineViewState returns an empty state when there are no timeline commits
timeline/viewState buildTimelineViewState uses the current commit sha to derive the selected index and indicator position
timeline/viewState buildTimelineViewState marks the state as at the end when the current commit is the last commit
timeline/viewState buildTimelineViewState uses playback time instead of the current commit timestamp for the indicator
timeline/viewState buildTimelineViewState clamps the indicator position below zero
timeline/viewState buildTimelineViewState clamps the indicator position above one hundred
timeline/viewState buildTimelineViewState falls back to the first timestamp when the current sha is missing
timeline/viewState buildTimelineViewState derives the indicator position from the commit range instead of absolute timestamps
timeline/viewState buildTimelineViewState limits the number of date ticks when a smaller max is provided
timeline/viewState getTimelineViewState returns the same derived state as buildTimelineViewState
graphView/provider/view/context updates graph data and returns the current graph snapshot
graphView/provider/view/context builds view context from workspace and editor state
graphView/provider/view/context uses the live vscode defaults to build the view context
graphView/provider/view/context sends available views through the provider message bridge
graphView/provider/view/context applies the active transform without trying to persist a separate built-in view id
graphView/provider/view/context uses the live default transform and view broadcast helpers
graphView/provider/view/context keeps the current graph transform result when no persistence is requested
getAvailableViews returns all core views when no plugin restriction applies
getAvailableViews excludes a plugin view whose plugin is not active
getAvailableViews includes a plugin view whose plugin is active
getAvailableViews excludes a view whose isAvailable() returns false
getAvailableViews sorts core views before non-core views
getAvailableViews sorts by registration order within the same core status
getAvailableViews returns an empty array when the map is empty
isViewAvailable returns false for an unknown view id
isViewAvailable returns true for a core view with no restrictions
isViewAvailable returns false when the required plugin is not active
isViewAvailable returns true when the required plugin is active
isViewAvailable returns false when isAvailable() returns false
graphView/view/rebuild returns early when rebuild graph data is requested without an analyzer
graphView/view/rebuild rebuilds graph data and resends groups, controls, and dependents when analyzer state is available
graphView/view/rebuild always rebuilds cached graph data for plugin toggles so legends and controls stay in sync
graphView/view/rebuild returns early when a smart rebuild is requested without an analyzer
graphView/provider/view/selection delegates focused-file updates through view selection helpers
graphView/provider/view/selection delegates depth-limit changes and reads back the current limit
graphView/provider/view/selection toggles depth mode and tolerates missing transform broadcasters
graphView/provider/view/selection delegates focused-file and depth-limit handlers without view lookup helpers
graphView/view/selection updates focused file and re-sends graph data only in depth mode
graphView/view/selection clamps depth limits, persists them, and re-sends graph data only in depth mode
graphView/view/selection returns the default depth limit when the view context does not set one
graphView/provider/view/selection default dependencies uses the default depth mode persistence delegates
graphView/provider/view/selection default dependencies uses the default focused-file, depth-limit, and readback delegates
graphView/view/context returns an empty plugin id set when there is no analyzer
graphView/view/context collects active plugin ids from the analyzer registry
graphView/view/context ignores plugin entries without an id
graphView/view/context returns workspace-relative paths through the shared path helper
graphView/view/context builds the current view context from workspace state and editor state
graphView/view/context falls back to default context values without workspace or editor state
ActiveFileBreadcrumb renders the active file as breadcrumbs
ActiveFileBreadcrumb filters empty breadcrumb segments from repeated or leading slashes
ActiveFileBreadcrumb opens the active file when clicked
ActiveFileBreadcrumb renders nothing without an active file
